content.text:
<session>
My service is throwing this error intermittently in production,
about 3 times per day:

ERROR 2024-01-15 03:47:22 - Unhandled exception in request
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "app/middleware.py", line 47, in __call__
    response = self.app(environ, start_response)
  File "app/router.py", line 23, in dispatch
    return handler(request)
  File "app/handlers/webhook.py", line 89, in handle_webhook
    event = self._parse_event(request.body)
  File "app/handlers/webhook.py", line 134, in _parse_event
    return EventParser(raw).parse()
  File "app/parsers/event_parser.py", line 67, in parse
    self._validate_signature()
  File "app/parsers/event_parser.py", line 43, in _validate_signature
    expected = hmac.new(self.secret, self.body, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'new'

Here is the relevant code from event_parser.py:

import hmac
import hashlib

class EventParser:
    def __init__(self, body):
        self.body = body
        self.secret = os.getenv('WEBHOOK_SECRET')

    def _validate_signature(self):
        sig = request.headers.get('X-Signature')
        expected = hmac.new(self.secret, self.body, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
        if not hmac.compare_digest(sig, expected):
            raise InvalidSignature('Signature mismatch')

    def parse(self):
        self._validate_signature()
        return json.loads(self.body)

Fix the bug. Then explain why this only happens 3 times a day
and not on every request.
</session>

Write the title in the language the user wrote in, regardless of the language of the examples above.
